_publications._publicationTitle: Multiplatform molecular analyses refine classification of gliomas arising in patients with neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Of the five patients with NF1-associated gliomas belonging to the molecular low-grade group, four experienced stable disease and absence of tumor growth while on MEK inhibitor therapy at time of last clinical follow-up. The fifth patient (#3) experienced partial regression
details: Of 5 patients with molecular low-grade NF1-associated gliomas treated with trametinib, 4 experienced stable disease and absence of tumor growth, and 1 experienced partial regression of optic pathway glioma
